Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Behemoth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — A Behemoth can be defeated by combining five Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — The Behemoth is a hulking beast of metal and flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — The Behemoth has city-sized armored plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Behemoths are created using staggering amounts of resources from the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Behemoths are assembled in shipyards using cyborg pieces including metal skeletons and digital brain-chips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Most Behemoth bodies are made from scavenged dreadnoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Behemoth bodies are typically formed from astral megafauna.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Behemoths possess cybernetic pieces, resistance to magic, and interact with Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Behemoth sizes vary from the size of cities to being large enough to crash through planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — A Behemoth made from a contrasaur has limbs woven from meat and machine, building-sized camera eyes, and starship armor protecting its vitals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Behemoth is a trump card of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — A Behemoth is a creature that can fight a Divine Titan fist-to-fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — There are perhaps ten Behemoths in the entire galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — Raion went all-out against the Behemoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — An insectoid Behemoth was hunting the Galactic Union fleet.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — A Behemoth is a creature that the Iron Legion made from Contrasaurs.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Raion previously fought the Behemoth.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
